name: The Blue Table
description: PandinGroups' signature fine dining restaurant offering an inventive fusion of continental and West African cuisine. Every dish is a masterpiece crafted from the freshest seasonal ingredients.
openHours: Breakfast: 6:30–10:30 AM | Lunch: 12:00–3:00 PM | Dinner: 6:00–11:00 PM

description: A relaxed all-day café serving artisan coffees, fresh pastries, light meals, and international dishes in a bright, airy setting with garden terrace seating.
